name: io.github.cyanheads/ntfy-mcp-server
description: MCP server for ntfy — send push notifications to devices via the ntfy.sh service.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the ntfy server (no trailing slash).

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_DEFAULT_TOPIC
environmentVariables.description: Topic used when a tool call omits `topic`. Treat the topic name as a secret — anyone who knows it can publish or subscribe.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer access token (`tk_…`). Mutually exclusive with NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME / NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth username — must be set together with NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth password — must be set together with NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_MAX_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts for transient upstream failures (5xx, network, 429).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: LOGS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for file-based logs (Node only; ignored on Workers).

environmentVariables.name: OTEL_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable OpenTelemetry instrumentation (spans, metrics, completion logs).

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the ntfy server (no trailing slash).

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_DEFAULT_TOPIC
environmentVariables.description: Topic used when a tool call omits `topic`. Treat the topic name as a secret — anyone who knows it can publish or subscribe.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer access token (`tk_…`). Mutually exclusive with NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME / NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth username — must be set together with NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_AUTH_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Basic-auth password — must be set together with NTFY_AUTH_USERNAME.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request HTTP timeout in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: NTFY_MAX_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts for transient upstream failures (5xx, network, 429).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SESSION_MODE
environmentVariables.description: HTTP session model: 'stateless', 'stateful', or 'auto'.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode to use: 'none', 'jwt', or 'oauth'.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: LOGS_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for file-based logs (Node only; ignored on Workers).

environmentVariables.name: OTEL_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable OpenTelemetry instrumentation (spans, metrics, completion logs).
